requirements.requirement: Verify that the IoT system is developed with the level of security (L1, L2, or L3) applicable to its capabilities
requirements.question: Is the IoT system developed with the level of security (L1, L2, or L3) applicable to its capabilities?

requirements.requirement: Verify that all components and communication channels in the IoT ecosystem have been identified
requirements.question: Have all components and communication channels in the IoT ecosystem been identified?

requirements.requirement: Verify that threat modeling is used as part of each product introduction design
requirements.question: Is threat modeling used as part of each product introduction design?

requirements.requirement: Verify that the device is able to detect physical tampering attempts
requirements.question: Is the device able to detect physical tampering attempts?

requirements.requirement: Verify that sensitive data is encrypted at rest
requirements.question: Is sensitive data encrypted at rest?

requirements.requirement: Verify that sensitive data is encrypted in transit
requirements.question: Is sensitive data encrypted in transit?

requirements.requirement: Verify that authentication mechanisms are implemented for device access
requirements.question: Are authentication mechanisms implemented for device access?

requirements.requirement: Verify that authorization controls are enforced at each access point
requirements.question: Are authorization controls enforced at each access point?

requirements.requirement: Verify that software/firmware updates are signed and verified before installation
requirements.question: Are software/firmware updates signed and verified before installation?

requirements.requirement: Verify that update mechanisms support rollback in case of failure
requirements.question: Do update mechanisms support rollback in case of failure?

requirements.requirement: Verify that the system enforces access control policies for all protected resources
requirements.question: Does the system enforce access control policies for all protected resources?
